pi_items.source: task.json and verifier.py (which checks for 'project pegasus' substring)

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically creates a synthetic document using python-docx in setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Documents/project_pegasus_raw.docx. The verifier.py script explicitly requires the final document to be saved at /home/ga/Documents/project_pegasus_final.docx. It also checks that the header contains 'project pegasus' and that a watermark with the exact text 'CONFIDENTIAL' is embedded in the document's XML header.
